createTeamDescription: {brandName} connects your team to cutting edge AI assistants while ensuring robust data protection and aiding in regulatory compliance management.
termsDisclaimer: By continuing, you're agreeing to our main terms of service. Additional disclosures are available in our privacy policy and cookie policy.
invitationIntro: You have been invited to join our team on {brandName}. {brandName} gives access to cutting edge AI assistants while ensuring robust data protection and regulatory compliance.
invitationExplore: Once you've joined, you'll be able to explore the platform's features and start collaborating with other team members immediately.
questionsContact: If you have any questions, please connect with us at
billingSubtitle: Here's what you get with your {brandName} Team Subscription
featurePremiumModels: Premium Assistant models with ultimate data privacy
featureCustomAssistants: Create secure custom assistants with your internal data
featureAdminConsole: Admin Console for user & compliance management
trialBannerRest: Cancel anytime before your trial period ends, we only charge you once your trial period is over.
promoApplied: 🎊 Awesome! You've successfully applied a promo code with a ${amount} discount
termsAccept: I have read and accept {brandShortName}'s <link>Terms & Conditions</link>
regionBlocked: We apologize, but our services are currently unavailable in your region. We hope to expand our coverage soon and appreciate your understanding.
secureAccountDescription: To keep your data safe, please set a PIN that is memorable. This PIN will encrypt your data to ensure your privacy.
unexpectedNotAdmin: Unexpected: User is not an admin or key is already set!
downloadRecoveryDescription1: As an Admin of this team, download your recovery key file and save it on your local device. You'll need it to reset your PIN.
downloadRecoveryDescription2: We take these measures to ensure your account stays fully encrypted.
downloadRecoveryDescription3: We have also sent you an email with the recovery key file, in case you misplace it.
inviteColleagues: Invite your colleagues to {brandName} and unleash the power of collaborative AI
inviteLinkAnyoneDescription: Anyone can join using this link
inviteLinkCompanyDescription: Anyone belonging to your company can join using this link
